prerequisites: An OPUSWatch API key (provided to the api_key field).
A start date value for the start_date field, used as the point from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by supplying your OPUSWatch API key in the required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the required fields
setupSteps.body: Enter your OPUSWatch API key in the api_key field and set start_date to the date from which the connector should begin syncing. Both fields are required.
